title: Seth Rogen Claims a Hollywood Megastar Quit 'Knocked Up' Over a Birthing Scene

The movie was a massive success, making over $219 million worldwide. But the big question remains: who was the mystery actor? Any guesses?

He says the unnamed actor walked off the project during its development.  Rogen says the star was uncomfortable with the film's childbirth sequence.
